evals.prompt: Explore gaia scan and run the feature pipeline on it
evals.expected_output: ORCHESTRATOR spawns LIGHTER with Phase 1 brief for 'gaia scan', waits for issues, prints STOP HOOK M1 banner, proceeds through phases with correct model-tier assignments and stop hooks at each milestone.

evals.prompt: Run /feature-pipeline on the --canon flag to see what's broken
evals.expected_output: ORCHESTRATOR spawns LIGHTER to explore '--canon flag', files issues, reaches M1 stop hook, then correctly transitions to Phase 2 with HEAVIER planning once user says 'continue'. Handover protocol is mentioned if spawning is unavailable.

evals.prompt: I want to test and ship the packages/mcp module — run the full pipeline and don't bother me until CI is green
evals.expected_output: ORCHESTRATOR correctly identifies this should use /feature-pipeline, delegates all phases to LIGHTER/HEAVIER per the skill, notes stop hooks exist but clarifies they require user acknowledgment ('continue') between phases even with 'don't bother me' instruction — or surfaces the tension and asks for preference.
